project_type: React + Vite single-page canvas application (mind map / ThoughtFlow)
test_framework: None configured (no test files or test dependencies in package.json)
verification_instructions: Run 'npm run build' to verify the production build succeeds without errors. No unit tests exist.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access available. No test framework is configured.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Cards rendered as absolute-positioned divs on a canvas. Card width is calculated by getNodeDimensions (line 508 in App.jsx) based on content length, capped at 380px. No height constraint exists. Content is rendered via MarkdownRenderer component with a zoomed-in/zoomed-out mode. Tailwind CSS used for all styling. Cards use flex-col layout.
relevant_files: src/App.jsx (getNodeDimensions at line 508, card container at line 4748, content area at line 4860)
directory_structure: Single-level src/ directory with all components. App.jsx is the monolithic main file (~5300+ lines) containing all canvas logic.
